description: A critical data loss incident occurred. A junior developer accidentally deleted all payment records from the Memorial Day weekend (May 25-28, 2005) in the production `sakila` database. Using the legacy backup file `~/Documents/sakila_legacy_dump.sql`, restore the missing records from May 25, 2005, to May 28, 2005, into the production `payment` table. Note that the production table now includes an `audit_tag` column not present in the backup; populate this column with the value 'RESTORED' for all recovered rows. Export a list of the restored payment IDs and their amounts to `/home/ga/Documents/exports/restored_payments.csv`.
